SPESTG-480 Deploy DIA Function App exception handling updates


This PR contains the DIA Function App updates validated in Dev for SPESTG-480.

Changes include:
- DIA exception handling and notification flow updates
- TPC Log / Dataverse notification fixes validated during Dev runtime testing
- DIA file validation handling updates
- Unit coverage for DIA exception email subject mapping
- Removed temporary DEV-only forced staging failure validation code before PR

Validation:
- Test Explorer run completed successfully
- Temporary ForceDiaStagingFailure logic removed
- Dev Function App runtime validation confirmed after required app settings were corrected
